daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are hitting different today, Ram. You're radiating that main character energy—trust it. Your intuition is basically your cheat code rn, so lean into those gut feelings and watch how things just align.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your person's noticing the glow. Single? Someone's been lowkey observing your moves. Either way, authenticity is your love language today. Don't perform—just be you and let that speak volumes.
daily.career: Your ideas have serious potential to make waves today. That project you've been hesitant about? The universe is giving you a green light to pitch it. Your confidence mixed with clarity is literally unstoppable energy.
daily.health: Your body's asking for intentional movement—nothing intense, just something that feels good. Whether it's a walk, stretching, or dancing in your room, listen to what energizes you. Rest hits different when you honor what you actually need.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your sector of self-discovery this week, Aries. It's giving introspective energy mixed with that signature fire you can't help but channel. Trust the weird impulses—they're pointing you somewhere real.
weekly.love: Venus wants you to be vulnerable in a way that feels almost uncomfortable. Whether you're single or coupled up, there's magic in showing up exactly as you are. Stop performing. Start being. The right people will stay.
weekly.career: Your creative instincts are *on point* right now. That project or idea you've been sitting on? The universe is basically nudging you to pitch it. The energy supports bold moves and speaking your truth in professional spaces.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentler movement this week—think walks, stretching, flow rather than force. Mental health check-in matters too. Journal, meditate, or just sit with your thoughts. Your nervous system's craving balance.
